name: Auto Open Video Player
description: Advanced video auto-opener with 5-second countdown override. Features comprehensive interception (XHR, Fetch, JWPlayer, HTML5 Media), a persistent draggable fallback button for manual triggering, and smart exclusion lists. Automatically detects and streams MP4, MKV, AVI, MOV, WMV, FLV, WEBM, M4V, MPG, MPEG, 3GP, TS, M3U8.
